name: Leigh's Candlelight Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Peach wine or peach nectar
1 1/4 lb Skinless, boneless chicken - cut into 1-inch cubes
1 medium Red bell pepper (sliced into 1/4-inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the peach wine or nectar, apricot preserves, and Dijon mustard. Whisk until blended.
2. Set aside.
3. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Add angel hair pasta and cook until just tender, about 1-2 minutes. Drain in a colander and rinse under cold running water. Drain well.
4. Heat 1 1/2 tbsp olive oil over high heat in a wok until hot, swirling to coat sides of the pan.
5. Add chicken and stir-fry until meat is white throughout but still juicy, about 3-4 minutes. Remove to a plate.
6. In the same wok, add remaining 1 1/2 tbsp olive oil over high heat. Add snow peas, bell pepper, green onions, garlic, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry vegetables until crisp-tender, about 2-3 minutes.
7. Return chicken and pasta to the wok. Mix in reserved mustard-fruit sauce. Cook, tossing, until heated through, about 1-2 minutes.
